hero.name: Arnav Garg
hero.subtitle: Security Researcher and Cyber Security Engineer with 3+ years of hands-on experience securing the SDLC end to end.
hero.description: I translate complex threat landscapes into automated defenses, blending shift-left security with GenAI insights so engineering teams can move fast without compromising integrity.

competencies: Security Testing: Penetration Testing, Red-Teaming, SAST, DAST, SCA, Secure Code Review
Automation & AI: GenAI automation, AI-assisted code review, automated security testing workflows, RAG-based solutions
DevOps & Cloud Security: Shift-left security, CI/CD security integration, threat modeling, incident response automation
achievements: Selected as Top Performer three times across H2 + quarterly milestones while leading GenAI automation for developer tooling.
Ranked in the Top 10% on TryHackMe through disciplined scenario runs and documenting playbooks for the team.
Solved 40+ HackTheBox machines, including ProLab: FullHouse and Fortress: JET, to keep offensive instincts sharp.
Earned HackerRank recognition for rapid vulnerability validation during collaborative red-team ops.

experiences.title: Cyber Security Engineer
experiences.summary: Leading GenAI-driven security automation, embedding penetration testing, detection, and compliance workflows into delivery pipelines.
impact: Implemented and enhanced end-to-end security pipelines as part of a shift-left strategy, improving vulnerability coverage and accelerating remediation across the SDLC.
Led penetration testing and red-teaming efforts to uncover critical vulnerabilities; collaborated with engineering teams to remediate findings and validate fixes.
Built GenAI-powered security automation (AI-assisted code reviews, automated security testing workflows) that reduced manual effort and improved audit readiness.
Designed threat modeling and incident response automation; created auto-generated reports and dashboards to track risk and time-to-mitigation.
Developed and deployed shift-report analytics to quantify security coverage and drive continuous improvement.

experiences.title: Associate Software Engineer (Security/Automation focus)
experiences.summary: Secured automation-first features and communication systems while collaborating with application teams on secure data handling.
impact: Designed and developed an Automated Calling Bot leveraging Azure AI, Twilio, and real-time streaming to streamline user interactions.
Implemented real-time transcription, automated emailing, and intelligent decision-making to support secure customer communications.
Architected a multi-user chat app with secure networking protocols and backend services on Python Flask.
Built a GUI-based password manager with encrypted storage and crypto best practices.
Delivered Auto-Invoice prediction and management tooling using Java, React, and Python to automate finance workflows.

projects.title: GenAI Automations Portfolio
projects.description: RAG for compliance questionnaires, AI code review bot, GenAI-integrated DAST solution, and shift-report automation for incident response.

projects.title: Reconnaissance Bot
projects.description: Automated passive/active enumeration tool (JS & Python) for security assessments that scales reconnaissance across attack surfaces.

projects.title: Secure Communication Suite
projects.description: Automated calling bot, real-time transcription, intelligent decisioning, and secure messaging built with Azure AI, Twilio, and streaming pipelines designed for privacy and customer trust.

projects.title: Ransomware Simulation Lab
projects.description: Ethical, controlled ransomware simulations to study attacker behavior, validate the playbook, and improve defensive readiness within approved ethics frames.

education.degree: Bachelors in Computer Science with Business Systems

certificates.name: Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
certificates.description: Demonstrated proficiency in offensive tooling, threat enumeration, and exploit validation.

certificates.name: Azure Security Engineer Associate (AZ-500)
certificates.description: Validated capability to design defensive controls, manage identity, and secure cloud-native workloads.

certificates.name: Offensive Security Certified Professional (OSCP)
certificates.description: Proved hands-on ability to breach and pivot across hardened lab networks under a timed exam.
